call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Oh, hi. Yeah, I was just looking at options. 
Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. That's, uh, based on the information you provided. What are you hoping to use the funds for, if you don't mind me asking? 
Eleanor: I'm thinking of consolidating some credit card debt. It's just… getting a little out of hand. 
Agent: I understand completely. A lot of people are in the same boat. With our loan, you could potentially save a significant amount on interest. We can tailor the repayment schedule to fit your budget. Like, we can go up to 60 months. 
Eleanor: 60 months? That sounds… long. 
Agent: It gives you flexibility! We can also do shorter terms, of course. What's your current monthly income, just to confirm? 
Eleanor: Around $6500. 
Agent: Perfect. And your credit score is looking good. So, we can definitely get this approved quickly. Are you comfortable moving forward with the application? It's all online, very straightforward. 
Eleanor: Okay, yeah. Let's do it. Sounds good. 
Agent: Fantastic! I'll send you the link right away. It'll take about 10 minutes. Do you have any questions before I do that?

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We have a special offer on our Signature Credit Card…
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at 19.99%…
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I'm on a fixed income! 
Agent: Well, it depends on your credit score…
Robert: (Interrupting) I don't want it! Don't call me again! (Click)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Mark from GreenTech said you guys were good. I'm looking at renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 12.5%. Now, let's talk about the details. Your credit score is excellent, so you qualify for our best rates. The loan term can be anywhere from 24 to 72 months. 
Jessica: 72 months sounds good. What about fees? 
Agent: Okay, so there's an origination fee of 1.5% of the loan amount, which would be $225. There's also a late payment fee of $25 if a payment is more than 15 days overdue. And, uh, there's no prepayment penalty. 
Jessica: Okay, $225… that's not terrible. What's the monthly payment look like with 72 months? 
Agent: Let me calculate that for you… Okay, with a 12.5% interest rate and a $15,000 loan over 72 months, your estimated monthly payment would be around $260. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. That's manageable. What documents do I need to provide? 
Agent: We'll need a copy of your driver's license, proof of income – like a bank statement or tax return – and proof of address. It's all uploaded securely through our online portal. 
Jessica: Alright, sounds good. I think I'm ready to proceed. 
Agent: Wonderful! I'll send you the link to the application. It should only take about 15-20 minutes to complete. Do you have any other questions for me at this time?

Agent: Hi Michael, this is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Oh, yeah, I was just checking out the rewards program. 
Agent: Great! We're offering you a $2,500 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 17.99%. It comes with 2% cashback on all purchases. 
Michael: 17.99%? That seems a little high. I have a card with a lower rate. 
Agent: I understand your concern. However, our card offers significantly better rewards. And, uh, we have a balance transfer option if you'd like to move your existing debt over. 
Michael: Hmm, a balance transfer… that could be useful. What's the fee for that? 
Agent: The balance transfer fee is 3% of the amount transferred. But, considering the cashback rewards, it could still save you money in the long run. 
Michael: Okay, I'll think about it. Can you send me some more information about the rewards program and the balance transfer details? 
Agent: Absolutely! I'll email you a brochure right away. It has all the information you need. Would you like me to add you to our mailing list for special offers? 
Michael: No, thank you. Just the brochure is fine. 
Agent: Perfect. You'll receive it within the next few minutes. Thanks for your time, Michael!

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special…
Patricia: (Interrupting, loudly) You called me yesterday! And the day before! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%…
Patricia: 24.99?! Are you trying to rob me?! I'm retired! I don't need a loan! 
Agent: We just wanted to…
Patricia: (Interrupting) I want my number removed from your list! Do not call me again! This is harassment! (Click)
